executives.name: Alan Carter
executives.background: Dr. Carter has over 30 years of experience in the exploration and mining industry. He was a co-founder of Peregrine Diamonds Ltd. and Magellan Minerals Ltd. He previously worked for Rio Tinto and BHP Billiton.

executives.name: Mark Smith
executives.background: Mr. Smith is a professional engineer with over 35 years of experience in the mining industry. He has served as CEO and Director of several public companies.

executives.name: Rodney Cooper
executives.background: Mr. Cooper is a mining engineer with over 35 years of experience in operations, project management, and corporate development. He was previously COO of Kinross Gold.
